text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Japanese Derby will soon be upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the racers have been gathered for a press
conference about the challenge before them.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahah! What am I expectin' from the Derby?
Do ya even have to ask?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Victory! Triumph! Conquest! What else could
there be?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Who's the world's strongest racer?! The Derby is
where that question will be answered!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Easy now, easy. Keep going on like that and you'll
tire yourself out before the race even starts.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Me, on the other hand, I'll be taking it slow like
always.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna know more, you'll just have to check
out the main event.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: M-my m-motivation?! My motivation is, um... um!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I-I want my moms and everyone back home to,
um, see me become number one in Japan, so...
Umm...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'll give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa... Seiun Sky... Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year's Japanese Derby is stacked with a
fearsome lineup of racers—Umamusume who were
turning heads before they even debuted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With precious little time remaining until the big
event, the atmosphere among the racers is
electric, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My name is Grass Wonder. It's a pleasure to make
your acquaintance.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Oh, she's here—the Beast's Successor!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! May I ask a question, please?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Go right ahead.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
After your impressive achievements in your junior
year, there are a lot of hopes riding on you. Are
you feeling any of that pressure now?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, I would be lying to say I haven't noticed the
pressure at all. However...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I will nonetheless face this challenge with a clear
mind and steady preparations. After all, luck
favors the brave.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And they do say the luckiest Umamusume wins
the Japanese Derby, yes?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, talk about having a cool head! Next
question...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting, Trainer. I finished the
interview without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. As I still have plenty of energy left, I'd like
to get right into some trai—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAASS! Stop, stop! Stop it right there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Phantom Bird appears outta the void!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' much! Just droppin' by to remind ya: This!
Is! War!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Over the top as usual, I see.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Didn't we both already voice our ambitions in the
press conference?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I heard you talkin', and it was a bunch of
goodie-two-shoes baloney!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know you've got more fire hidden under the prim
little Nadeshiko act.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So that's why I'm here to talk to the real you, Grass!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
To tell you how super, mega, ultra psyched I am
to face you, frente a frente, in an all-out clash!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The race to decide who is la primera! Who is at
the top of the world! Here we goooo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My, my.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder stands there silently for a moment
before finally saying with a gentle smile...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Consider it a match.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That little run-in with El cost us time. Shall we
make up for it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, yes...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
After all, each Classic race is a once-in-a-lifetime
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, Sei, Spe... They're going to do everything in
their power to emerge victorious in this race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But I will not allow them to pass me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
For a far greater shadow looms... further down
the path I tread.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The seconds are ticking down to the day of the
Japanese Derby.
